title: The Disabled Persons Transport Advisory Committee: annual report 2024 to 2025
body: "The report highlights the work of the Disabled Persons Transport Advisory Committee (DPTAC) between 1 April 2024 and 31 March 2025.  It reports on the advice given by the DPTAC, and its working groups, to the Secretary of State on the transport needs of disabled people and the development of policy and other proposals.  "
